title: capnoides wetherillii
intro: Capnoides wetherillii, also known as the "cypress vine," is a type of flowering vine native to Australia. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Capnoides wetherillii include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing relief from skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
